candidate.completion: lower your standards enough to count this as company.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower your standards enough to count this as company.

evaluation.rationale: A real turn lands in treating companionship as a standard one must lower to accept the speaker. The pivot is exact and humanly legible, but the line is a little long and ungainly, which keeps it from hitting with cleaner aphoristic force.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
